milestone_summary: M1: Teacher orientation complete; M2: PBL rollout 70% done; M3: Community meetings initiated
draft_report_text: PBL implementation has begun across District A and B with 70% of schools conducting sessions. Evidence submission is at 65%, indicating documentation gaps. Attendance rates are healthy at 78%. Teacher orientation milestone is complete. Recommend focused support for evidence documentation in Block 002.

milestone_summary: M1: Complete; M2: PBL rollout 82%; M3: Parent engagement sessions done
draft_report_text: Strong progress in August with PBL completion rising to 82% and evidence submission improving to 76%. Attendance has improved to 83%. District A shows particular improvement. The program is on track to meet Q2 targets. Ongoing support needed for Block 003 schools.

milestone_summary: M1: Complete; M2: PBL rollout 92%; M3: All community sessions done; M4: Q3 review passed
draft_report_text: Excellent performance in September with 92% PBL completion and 88% evidence submission. Both districts show improvement. Attendance at 88% is the highest recorded. All Q3 milestones achieved. Program is a strong model for scale.

milestone_summary: M1: Curriculum modules 1-2 drafted; M2: Infrastructure renovation started; M3: Baseline assessment done
draft_report_text: Program launched in District C and D with 68% PBL completion. Evidence submission at 60% needs improvement. Infrastructure work is underway in 5 schools. Curriculum development is progressing. Attendance at 76% is near target.

milestone_summary: M1: Modules 1-3 complete; M2: 8 additional schools in renovation; M3: Mid-term assessment complete
draft_report_text: Good improvement in August with PBL at 80% and evidence at 74%. Infrastructure improvements are visible in student outcomes. Attendance improved to 82%. District D is showing strong momentum. Evidence documentation trainings are recommended.

milestone_summary: M1: All core modules ready; M2: Infrastructure complete in 12 schools; M3: Q3 evaluation done; M4: Milestone review approved
draft_report_text: Outstanding results in September. PBL completion at 90% and evidence at 86%. Infrastructure improvements completed across 12 schools. Both districts showing strong attendance improvement. Program well-positioned for Q4.

milestone_summary: M1: Scholarships disbursed to 18 students; M2: 10 mentors onboarded; M3: Digital tablets procured
draft_report_text: District E program launched with 73% PBL completion. 18 scholarship students identified and supported. 10 mentors onboarded. Digital resources procured for 5 schools. Evidence submission at 62% needs targeted support. Attendance healthy at 79%.

milestone_summary: M1: Second cohort enrolled (36 total); M2: Mentorship scaled; M3: Software activated across all schools
draft_report_text: Strong August with PBL at 83% and evidence at 76%. Scholarship program now covering 36 students. Mentorship sessions running in all 3 blocks. Digital resources fully deployed. Attendance at 85% surpasses target. District E emerging as a high-performer.

milestone_summary: M1: Full scholarship cohort active; M2: Career guidance complete; M3: All schools digitally equipped; M4: Q3 milestone review passed
draft_report_text: Exceptional September results. PBL at 92% and evidence at 88%. All scholarship students active. Career guidance program successfully completed. Every school in District E now has digital resources. Attendance at 89% is program high. Ready for Q4 scale-up.
